title: Dota integrated
description: Defeat the Ancients, kill Roshan, shop at the shopkeeper and improve yourself and your abilities.
body:
### In active development!
Defeat the Ancients, kill Roshan, shop at the shopkeeper and improve yourself and your abilities.
### A short guide
In the beginning, you need to find a new biome: the magic forest.

Here you can mine new ore, earn gold by killing forest creeps and being well prepared to attack the Ancient. With the Ancient, you will receive crafting items and a lot of gold coins and weapons with armor (with a small chance). Next, you should buy equipment from shop keeper. 

You will be able to increase your maximum mana from the fragments of the Ancient and mana ore, and by killing Roshan you will increase your HP and get powerful artifacts

![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hWS776GD/images/302676769a6dc4e0f88196b370f49a2bd419f890.png)
### 
### Combine equipment to gain abilities
 

## Weapon
### Mana steal sword
5 attack damage 2 attack speed

Steal 2 mana on every hit

### Mana steal pickaxe
Steal 2 mana on every broken block

### Juggernaut sword
7 attack damage 1.3 attack speed

In 30 % chance deals critical damage

On right click spend 50 mana and spawn Heaking ward if Juggernaut mask equiped

### Radiance
10 attack damage 0.6 attack speed

While in hand it gives the effect of evasion

On right click sets everyone around on fire cooldown 20 sec

### Diffusual blade
5 attack damage 2 attack speed

Steal 5 mana on every hit and inflict slowness II

### Hook
5 hit damage 

Spend 100 mana and grab enemy

### Blades of attack
3 attack damage 2 attack speed

### Grenade
Deploys a shrapnel charge, covering the target area in a rain of explosive pellets.

Enemies underneath take damage and are slowed.

### Reaver
4 attack damage 1 attack speed

On right click increases max hp by 6

## Armor
### Juggernaut mask
6 armor 2 armor toughness 1 knockback resistance

On juggernaut sword right click summon healing ward that inflicts regeneration II effect

Cost 100 mana

Cooldown 20 sec

### Zeus leggins
5 armor

On 2 skill click strikes enemies within 40 blocks with lightning

Cost 200 mana

Cooldown 40 sec

### Void helmet
6 armor 2 armor toughness 1 knockback resistance

On 4 skill click Spawn chronosphere for 10 seconds

Stops time for everyone around you.

Caster gains Fire Resistance, Speed, Strength, Defense II, Haste, and Hunger II

Radius 15 block

Cost 200 mana

Cooldown 30 sec

### Phase boots
5 armor 

On 1 skill click give speed 2 for 5 sec

Cost 0 mana

Cooldown 10 sec

### Arcane boots
3 armor 

On 1 skill click give 200 mana

Cost 0 mana

Cooldown 60 sec

### Venomancer chestplate
5 armor 

On 3 skill click give 3 summoned Plague ward what poisons with a blow

Time of life Plague ward: 30 sec

Cost 50 mana

Cooldown 10 sec

### Pudge apron
5 armor 

On 3 skill click poisons everyone around at 8 sec

Cost 25 mana

Cooldown 10 sec

### Techies helmet
2 armor 1 armor toughness

On 4 skill click summon Red mine

Cost 75 mana

Cooldown 15 sec

### Circlet of Mirana
2 armor 

On 4 skill click summon rideable mount

4 skill click at mount for jump

Cost 25 mana

Cooldown 10 sec

### Sniper chestplate
8 armor 

Give 3 Grenadee

Cost 50 mana

Cooldown 10 sec

## items
### Mango
When eating give 50 mana

### Clarity
give 100 mana in 20 sec

### Blink dagger 
Work like Ender pearl

Cooldown 10 sec

### Rod of Atos
On hit, immobilizes the target for 3 seconds.

Cost 50 mana

### Forse stuff
pushes oneself or the target in the direction of one's gaze

Cooldown 20 sec

### Gleipnir
On hit, immobilizes the target for 3 seconds in 5 block

Cost 50 mana

Cooldown 10 sec

### Mana executer
Stores 25 mana, taking 50 mana or 10 hp if there is not enough mana

### Mana booster
increases max mana to 50 (300 max)

### Soul booster
increases max hp to 2 (max 5 use)

### Talisman of evasion
Give evade effect

Nullifies attack damage at 30% chance.

### Heart of Tarrasque
increases max hp to 10 and add Regeneration 2 effect.

### Teleport scroll
On first use, remembers coordinates.

On second use, spends 100 mana and transfers to specified coordinates

### Tome of knowlenge
Give 5 lvl + 1 lvl for each use.
